en.extract:
The Yemen thrush (Turdus menachensis) is a species of bird in the thrush family Turdidae. It is native to the Sarawat Mountains of the western Arabian Peninsula.

The '''Yemen thrush''' ('''''Turdus menachensis''''') is a species of bird in the [[thrush (bird)|thrush]] family Turdidae. It is native to the [[Sarawat Mountains]] of the western [[Arabian Peninsula]].

zh.extract:
葉門鶇（學名：Turdus menachensis）是鶇科中的一個物種，棲息於中東一帶。
